items.title: 【沙耶之歌】震碎三观的邪作，如何成为玩家心中的意难平？
items.summary:
如果说提到早年的邪典游戏，那么沙耶之歌绝对是TOP级别，仅凭短短3小时的流程，就能让玩过的所有玩家集体沉默。他被称之为绝望爱恋，是贴吧神奇之一，其中女主沙耶不仅在cos圈里大名鼎鼎，还和不少其他作品展开联动。
	那么这部原作究竟讲了个什么故事，最终的结局又是什么呢。
  └ 念尘先生nianchen (7赞): 这也是经典中的经典了（话说夺命邮差2DLC也有致敬）[笑哭]
  └ Bitter_Candy (3赞): 好耶，这次讲的是禁忌之恋[doge]那么下次又是什么呢
  └ 黑夜黑雨 (3赞): 最近的新番《尼古猫猫》不就是类沙耶之歌作品吗？我们都知道，那其实是个颓废无能恶习一身的中年人，但动画用幻觉让我们看到的是一个猫耳美少女[滑稽]

[汤圆]心得体会：
1.道中不用觉醒，但是墨菲大不能断。低配要蹲的话造物可以多拿生存。
2.王关一定要觉醒莫斯，然后觉醒沙耶，可能狂气回转会快一些？emmm
3.墨菲大很珍贵，一定要续上，基本是静海抗一下，墨菲大招抗一下，船妹救一下这样子循环。
4.蹲到莫斯满暴击+1400%腕触加成的时候可以尝试爆发一波了，切怒涛，有胎的话喂给莫斯吃，墨菲3费挂易伤，然后沙耶0费挂侵蚀，沙耶开大印莫斯牌，追击一次，然后双发钥令，追击两次，最后莫斯开大，大概能打的伤害可以这样算：侵蚀数*3+莫斯大招明面红字数值*10，不过可能不太准[捂眼]

items.title: ［米油TV］沙耶之油，由中药组成的少女
items.summary:
《沙耶之油》
 
明明是浓稠黏腻、贫瘠无味的米油怪物，在我眼中，却是世间唯一干净的少女。
我叫虞姬，一名爱用偏方、自学中医的学徒。
家中长辈偏爱古法养生，全家误食五斤相思子，双亲离世，只留我独活
 
我侥幸捡回性命，却因自呱呱坠地起，便被长辈日日灌下五千克米油，空无一物的淀粉汤水彻底替代西方的肉蛋奶。这份古法，与相思子一同扭曲了我的感官与认知。
 从此，我的世界输入了/execute @s ~ ~ ~fill ~-3 ~-3 ~-3 ~3 ~3 ~3 stone一般，一切都改变了。

items.summary: 呵呵积怨已久那必须给个差评了。角色设计很有意思。剧情额剧情还凑合吧，主线除了基本没怎么get到，随便看看得了，早期支线还是有点意思的，其实我感觉水平太飘忽了要不是我推剧情可爱我真不想说剧情还可以。最近的剧情也越来越绷了，为啥那么多男嘉豪角色出点相对人性化的男的谢谢，还有星辰篇二章开始疯狂塞学长梦女内容啥意思？全世界智商不变守密人智商下降100%是吗？那你赢了，你的ml内容又短又难吃，你反复堆词赋魅的梦向npc转正角色我没有一毛钱兴趣，只觉得莫名其妙。那我问你守密人对这个学长突如其来汹涌的爱到底是为啥呢？忘却篇他们有见面超过三次吗？我也不是对学长有意见只是感觉这操作也太神人了吧。这俩保持正常前后辈关系对剧情有任何影响吗？哪怕你说这个过程里守密人跟学长逐渐拉近关系我也不说啥了，这总得有个循序渐进的过程吧。而且剧情需要他们关系那么莫名其妙的亲近吗？星辰篇二章明明是医生主场，结果一大半内容全是这个男的原生家庭那个男的原生家庭，我请问了？到最后讲医生的内容只有第三段的那一部分，前面的内容删掉完全没影响啊，没感受到情绪也没看出来有什么伏笔。我真劝你们一句要是文案组里有梦女就赶紧开了吧，实在是影响剧情观感，有空给npc贴膜不如多修修剧情连贯性吧，前因全靠猜哇靠真的太绝了。

items.title: [负面] Very decent game that I can't recommend at the cur...
items.summary:
Very decent game that I can't recommend at the current time.
Every stage is pretty much a mini roguelite where you collect relics and power up your party's cards, and then you fight the final boss.
The different factions and synergies were pretty interesting.
There even is a pvp mode where each character has a different card for this mode.
The devs are also pretty generous with pulls.

As for the negative points, only the prologue has any voice acting, aside from combat.
The story was unreadable to me, because the text were very obviously machine-translated and did not make any sense.
The skill cards and mechanics are also machine translated and were inconsistent in some places.
I couldn't get invested in the story or character, since I had no idea what was going on, and the bosses were starting to get unreasonably hard, so I just dipped, would not recommend unless they actually get human translation for everything.

items.title: [正面] When I first downloaded this game I wan't expectin...
items.summary:
When I first downloaded this game I wan't expecting anything amazing, but I'm glad I was wrong!

This game is great and scratches that card game itch I keep having. The game is similar to other card games on Steam (mainly Slay the Spire), but it adds progression and gacha mechanics into the mix. The game doesn't feel overly monetized or pay to win though, as I've had a very nice f2p experience, and have been able to progress at a pretty good rate. 

The art and the feel of the game are also very good plus the game also just always has something to do. So I definitively recommend trying this game if you like card games, especially since it's free!

items.title: Rant on people complaining about packs and pulls
items.summary:
Plenty of pulls (unless you like to get needless copies). I have zero clue why someone said 500 bucks for an event?? Where?? And if they were talking about all the packs the game has to offer, yeah I actually agree it’s not worth it. But you know why? Because their bad value is so clearly meant for the whales AND there is no PVP so there’s been no FOMO for me. Coming from someone who has quit countless games from FOMO. 

And you’re supposed to use your brain (and patience) to pull for good characters with the plentiful pulls you have, gradually build characters, and THEN clear ENDGAME content. You aren’t supposed to grab the one specific character you want. You pull on the current limited banners (which have characters CAPABLE of clearing lots of content). Before then, there is plenty to do. I’m 3 weeks in and still progressing my way WITHOUT roadblocks through chapter seven out of however many on ARC ONE. And I’ve still yet to get into d-tide or that train thing or whatever.

And they did mention 60 bucks for 250 pulls but forgot to mention that the same event gives you 250 FREE pulls…also it’s not 60 bucks it’s like 40. 250 being handed out is already diabolical like what are you talking about, u want a thousand when a character is guaranteed at 90 pulls, but pity is at 30?

Not a single character is useless. Like if a character is listed as B tier, they’re GREAT in certain comps. C tier too depending on the guide you’re using. Even standard characters are good. Caecus and Sanga are cracked.

And finally, great art. 

My only complaint would be that most characters aren’t animated, but I found out the game was close to EOS not long ago so it makes sense.

I feel bad for the ppl who can’t login though. Had to connect my account on several devices and though it was confusing, I eventually brute forced my way through with my apple account.

items.title: very much recommend!!
items.summary: a bit of a long review, but i saw this game & was a little hesitant to download, but I’m so glad i did. the characters are very well designed & even the mc’s (female & male) are pretty. the combat is like a card game (similar to r1999) with turn-based combat, and the backgrounds are gorgeous. the english translation is apparently in beta, but i haven’t noticed any translation mistakes so far. the story is very compelling thus far and highlighted by the detailed art & characters. the combat itself is very nice to look at, and isn’t mechanically clunky or too difficult. it also includes some art within it, which is very pretty. the voice lines are not in english (I’m not sure if they’ll be in english at some point) but they’re so well preformed enough that the language barrier isn’t an issue, you can tell exactly what the characters are saying via the text & their tones. the gacha, as far as I’ve seen, is fairly good. it has a limited & standard banners just like any other gacha game, and currency doesn’t seem too hard to get. this game is so good that i was passionate enough to write this review. just play it.

items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 「融触」を終わらせたい気持ちと、ゲームとして終わってほしくない気持ちが同時に存在
items.summary: 「融触」を終わらせたい気持ちと、ゲームとして終わってほしくない気持ちが同時に存在する不思議なゲーム。　きっかけは皆さんご存知の沙耶の唄。正直コラボアイテムが手に入ればなんでも良かったので、ゲーム自体にあまりこだわりはなかった。 　が、いざやってみるとなんという衝撃。あまりにも作り込みがすごい。まず、突然の混乱から始まり、そのあとに世界観を掴ませるという、疾走感のあるチュートリアルが本当に良く考えられている。キャラ同士の関係をナチュラルにまとめ、甘えを出し抜いた本気の展開に感情移入が止まらず気付けば設定資料を1日中読み漁る日々。特にお気に入りのシルバーコア通信では、それぞれの一面が垣間見えほっこりする時もあれば真剣に眺めることもあり、毎日誰かからのメッセージを待ってしまう。デフォルメでありながら一切妥協しないモーションやカメラワーク、ストーリーの街をなぞらせるようにマス目の上で攻略を進めるシステムも他にはない新しい体験を得ることができる。 　何から何まで演出に富んだ忘却前夜、制作に当たった全てのスタッフには数え切れないぐらいの感謝と尊敬を心からを示したい。銀の鍵の導きがあらんことを。

items.summary: 沙耶の唄コラボからプレイを始めました。沙耶の唄コラボシナリオは原作を尊重しつつ忘却前夜の世界観に非常に上手く馴染ませています。また沙耶は川村みどりさんが演じ主題歌はいとうかなこさんが歌いシナリオにはニトロオリジンが監修に入っているという本気度なので是非この機会にプレイしてほしい。ゲームの方はルールの理解に少し時間が掛かりましたがカードゲームの様な戦闘は奥深く面白いです。お得な課金パックの誘惑が多い点は良くも悪くも課金に抵抗のない人にとってはリーズナブルに課金が出来るのでいいと思います。ストーリークリアでの課金パック等の購入期限はもう少し長くするか購入権利の復活等があれば初めは訳も分からず課金を見送った人でも後になって欲しくなった人が買ってくれる気がします。沙耶の唄コラボの沙耶と沙耶用の装備のPUは８月中旬まであるので今から始めても間に合いますが、沙耶の唄コラボのミッション(沙耶１体無料で貰える)やお得な課金パックはPUよりも開催期間が短いので始めるなら今すぐがいいですよ(6月25 日に終了)
